1267	/-- **(iii-1) Unit expansion: inverting the comp-coherence.** For composable `a : X₁ ⟶ X₂`,
1268	`b : X₂ ⟶ X₃`, a module `N` on `X₃`, and `g' = a ≫ b`, the bare `(g')`-unit expands as the
1269	four-factor composite `η^b ≫ b_*(η^a) ≫ pushforwardComp(a,b).hom ≫ g'_*(pullbackComp(a,b).hom)`.
1270	This is the inversion of the leg-reindex engine `pullbackPushforward_unit_comp`: post-composing its
1271	identity with `g'_*(pullbackComp.hom)` collapses the trailing `pullbackComp.inv` (functoriality of
1272	`g'_*` on `inv ≫ hom = id`). See blueprint `lem:base_change_mate_fstar_reindex_legs_unitExpand`. -/
1273	theorem base_change_mate_fstar_reindex_legs_unitExpand {X₁ X₂ X₃ : Scheme.{u}}
1274	    (a : X₁ ⟶ X₂) (b : X₂ ⟶ X₃) (N : X₃.Modules) :
1275	    (Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction (a ≫ b)).unit.app N
1276	      = ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction b).unit.app N ≫
1277	          (Scheme.Modules.pushforward b).map
1278	            ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction a).unit.app
1279	              ((Scheme.Modules.pullback b).obj N)) ≫
1280	          (Scheme.Modules.pushforwardComp a b).hom.app
1281	            ((Scheme.Modules.pullback a).obj ((Scheme.Modules.pullback b).obj N))) ≫
1282	        (Scheme.Modules.pushforward (a ≫ b)).map
1283	          ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp a b).hom.app N) := by
1284	  rw [pullbackPushforward_unit_comp a b N]
1285	  -- The two trailing `(a ≫ b)_*`-images cancel (`pullbackComp.inv ≫ pullbackComp.hom = 𝟙`), but a
1286	  -- spurious `X.Modules` instance diamond under single-file elaboration makes `rw [Category.assoc]`
1287	  -- / `rw [hI]` / `simp only [Iso.inv_hom_id_app]` misfire on the goal's locked composition. We
1288	  -- prove the cancellation on FRESH terms (where the rewrites match) and discharge the goal in
1289	  -- term mode (`exact`), which checks defeq and tolerates the diamond.
1290	  have hI : (Scheme.Modules.pushforward (a ≫ b)).map ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp a b).inv.app N) ≫
1291	        (Scheme.Modules.pushforward (a ≫ b)).map ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp a b).hom.app N)
1292	      = 𝟙 _ := by
1293	    rw [← Functor.map_comp, Iso.inv_hom_id_app, CategoryTheory.Functor.map_id]
1294	  have hfin := (congrArg (fun z =>
1295	      (Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction (a ≫ b)).unit.app N ≫ z) hI).trans
1296	    (Category.comp_id _)
1297	  exact ((Category.assoc _ _ _).trans hfin).symm

1302	is `(Spec φ)_* ⋙ Γ_R`, giving the four `Γ`-image factors of the blueprint. See blueprint
1303	`lem:base_change_mate_fstar_reindex_legs_gammaDistribute`. -/

1307	    F.map ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction (a ≫ b)).unit.app N)

1310	            ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction a).unit.app

1829	
1830	The argument is carried out directly on the module of global sections; no abstract adjoint-mate
1831	identification at the level of sheaves intervenes. By `ModuleCat` hom-extensionality it suffices to
1832	check on the `R'`-module generators `1 ⊗ₜ x` (`ext x`), leaving the concrete per-generator identity
1833	`(Θ_src⁻¹ ≫ Γ(θ) ≫ Θ_tgt) (1 ⊗ x) = regroupEquiv.inv (1 ⊗ x)`. By construction `Γ(θ)` is, read on
1834	global sections through the two tilde dictionaries `pushforward_spec_tilde_iso` /
1835	`pullback_spec_tilde_iso` packaged in `Θ_src`, `Θ_tgt`, the extension of scalars along `ψ : R → R'`
1836	of the algebraic unit of extension of scalars along `A → A ⊗_R R'` (`m ↦ (1 ⊗ 1) ⊗ m`); evaluating
1837	through the `R'`-action on the target gives `1 ⊗ x ↦ (1 ⊗ 1) ⊗ x`, which is exactly
1838	`regroupEquiv.inv` on generators (both sides `R'`-linear). This theorem's **body has no inline
1839	`sorry`** (it unfolds `pushforwardBaseChangeMap` to its `(g^* ⊣ g_*)`-counit form
1840	(`Adjunction.homEquiv_counit`) and is then exactly Seam 3, `base_change_mate_gstar_transpose ψ φ M`),
1841	but it is **transitively `sorry`-backed** through `base_change_mate_gstar_transpose`. The single
1842	residual obligation
1843	of the whole Seam-3 chain — the mate-unwinding coherence over the generic pullback square — lives in
1844	`base_change_mate_gstar_transpose` (and, beneath it, in the Seam-2 leg-reindex
1845	`base_change_mate_fstar_reindex_legs`), NOT here. With that discharged,
1846	`base_change_mate_generator_trace` is a one-line corollary. -/
1847	theorem base_change_mate_section_identity {R R' A : CommRingCat.{u}}
1848	    (ψ : R ⟶ R') (φ : R ⟶ A) (M : ModuleCat.{u} A) :
1849	    (base_change_mate_domain_read ψ φ M).inv ≫
1850	      (moduleSpecΓFunctor (R := R')).map
1851	        (pushforwardBaseChangeMap (Spec.map φ) (Spec.map ψ)
1852	          (Limits.pullback.snd (Spec.map φ) (Spec.map ψ))
1853	          (Limits.pullback.fst (Spec.map φ) (Spec.map ψ))
1854	          (IsPullback.of_hasPullback (Spec.map φ) (Spec.map ψ)).w (tilde M)) ≫
1855	      (base_change_mate_codomain_read ψ φ M).hom
1856	      = (base_change_mate_regroupEquiv ψ φ M).inv := by
1857	  -- COUNIT FACTORIZATION (blueprint Seam 3 step): `pushforwardBaseChangeMap` is by definition the
1858	  -- `(g^* ⊣ g_*)`-adjunction transpose `((pullbackPushforwardAdjunction g).homEquiv _ _).symm inner`
1859	  -- of the inner pushforward comparison `inner`. By `Adjunction.homEquiv_counit` this transpose is

/-- **(iii, links 1+3 fused) Distribute the inner `(a ≫ b)`-unit through `(Spec φ)_* ⋙ Γ_R` and
collapse the transparent `pushforwardComp` middle factor.** On CLEAN terms (a single instance of the
`X.Modules` category struct is in play, so keyed `rw` fires, unlike on the locked main goal), the
`Γ_R`-image of the `(Spec φ)_*`-image of the `(a ≫ b)`-pullback–pushforward unit at `N` distributes,
via `base_change_mate_fstar_reindex_legs_gammaDistribute`, into four `Γ_R∘(Spec φ)_*`-image factors,
of which the third (the `pushforwardComp a b` hom-coherence) collapses to `𝟙` by
`base_change_mate_inner_eCancel_pushforwardComp`. The result is the three-factor reduced form
`Γ(G η^b) ≫ Γ(G (b_* η^a)) ≫ Γ(G ((a≫b)_* (pullbackComp a b).hom))`. This is the diamond-free
building block to be spliced (via `congrArg`/`.trans`, then a defeq-bridging `exact`) into the locked
main goal of `base_change_mate_fstar_reindex_legs`. -/
theorem base_change_mate_fstar_reindex_legs_link_distributeCollapse {X₁ X₂ : Scheme.{u}}
    {R A : CommRingCat.{u}} (a : X₁ ⟶ X₂) (b : X₂ ⟶ Spec A) (φ : R ⟶ A) (N : X₂.Modules) :
    (moduleSpecΓFunctor (R := R)).map
        ((Scheme.Modules.pushforward (Spec.map φ)).map
          ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction (a ≫ b)).unit.app N))
      = (moduleSpecΓFunctor (R := R)).map
          ((Scheme.Modules.pushforward (Spec.map φ)).map
            ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction b).unit.app N))
        ≫ (moduleSpecΓFunctor (R := R)).map
            ((Scheme.Modules.pushforward (Spec.map φ)).map
              ((Scheme.Modules.pushforward b).map
                ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction a).unit.app
                  ((Scheme.Modules.pullback b).obj N))))
        ≫ (moduleSpecΓFunctor (R := R)).map
            ((Scheme.Modules.pushforward (Spec.map φ)).map
              ((Scheme.Modules.pushforward (a ≫ b)).map
                ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp a b).hom.app N))) := by
  rw [base_change_mate_fstar_reindex_legs_gammaDistribute a b N
    (F := Scheme.Modules.pushforward (Spec.map φ) ⋙ moduleSpecΓFunctor (R := R))]

  rw [base_change_mate_inner_eCancel_pushforwardComp a b φ
    ((Scheme.Modules.pullback a).obj ((Scheme.Modules.pullback b).obj N)),

    {R A : CommRingCat.{u}} (a : X₁ ⟶ X₂) (b : X₂ ⟶ Spec A) (φ : R ⟶ A) (N : (Spec A).Modules) :

    {R A : CommRingCat.{u}} (a : X₁ ⟶ X₂) (b : X₂ ⟶ Spec A) (φ : R ⟶ A) (N : (Spec A).Modules) :
    (Scheme.Modules.pushforward (Spec.map φ) ⋙ moduleSpecΓFunctor (R := R)).map
        ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction (a ≫ b)).unit.app N)
      = (Scheme.Modules.pushforward (Spec.map φ) ⋙ moduleSpecΓFunctor (R := R)).map
          ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction b).unit.app N)
        ≫ (Scheme.Modules.pushforward (Spec.map φ) ⋙ moduleSpecΓFunctor (R := R)).map
            ((Scheme.Modules.pushforward b).map
              ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction a).unit.app
                ((Scheme.Modules.pullback b).obj N)))
        ≫ (Scheme.Modules.pushforward (Spec.map φ) ⋙ moduleSpecΓFunctor (R := R)).map
            ((Scheme.Modules.pushforward (a ≫ b)).map
              ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp a b).hom.app N)) := by
  -- Distribute `(Spec φ)_* ⋙ Γ_R` over the four `unitExpand` factors via `gammaDistribute` at the
  -- composite functor `F := (Spec φ)_* ⋙ Γ_R`. Everything stays in the single `F.map` form
  -- (no `Functor.comp_map` re-elaboration), so the third factor `F.map ((pushforwardComp a b).hom)`
  -- and the `gammaDistribute` output carry the SAME `F` instance — keyed `rw` fires (no diamond).
  -- Factor 3 (the `pushforwardComp a b` hom-coherence) has identity `F`-image: its section value
  -- is `𝟙`, and `F` carries identities to identities.
  have hFc : (Scheme.Modules.pushforward (Spec.map φ) ⋙ moduleSpecΓFunctor (R := R)).map
      ((Scheme.Modules.pushforwardComp a b).hom.app
        ((Scheme.Modules.pullback a).obj ((Scheme.Modules.pullback b).obj N))) = 𝟙 _ :=
    (congrArg (Scheme.Modules.pushforward (Spec.map φ) ⋙ moduleSpecΓFunctor (R := R)).map
      (show (Scheme.Modules.pushforwardComp a b).hom.app
          ((Scheme.Modules.pullback a).obj ((Scheme.Modules.pullback b).obj N)) = 𝟙 _ from rfl)).trans
    ((Scheme.Modules.pushforward (Spec.map φ) ⋙ moduleSpecΓFunctor (R := R)).map_id _)
  rw [base_change_mate_fstar_reindex_legs_gammaDistribute a b N
    (F := Scheme.Modules.pushforward (Spec.map φ) ⋙ moduleSpecΓFunctor (R := R)), hFc,
    Category.comp_id, Category.assoc]
